data.raceName: LADBROKES ODDS SURGE PATHWAY PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. PLANET DOWNS ran fourth last start at this track over 2040m, beaten 7 metres. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position. Has the talent to take care of this field. 6. SHES MY MISTAKE got the start wrong last time out but was racing consistently with a string of placings prior. She is worth another chance. 8. IM BUSTED showed pleasing improvement last time out when runner-up over 1660m at Albion Park. Can make an impact here. 1. WECANONLYDREAM has been racing very well of late, putting four placings together. Can be competitive again from this draw.","runners":[2,6,8,1],"exclusive":false}
